type_definitions.name: AddTaskUseCase
type_definitions.description: Usecase-layer struct that adds a new task to a track's impl-plan.json. Implemented per ADR 2026-04-19-1242 §D1.4 / T007: reads ImplPlanDocument via ImplPlanReader, delegates to ImplPlanDocument::add_task, persists via ImplPlanWriter, then returns the current TrackMetadata and the newly-allocated TaskId.

type_definitions.name: TransitionTaskUseCase
type_definitions.description: Usecase-layer struct that applies a state transition to a task in impl-plan.json. Implemented per ADR 2026-04-19-1242 §D1.4 / T007: reads ImplPlanDocument via ImplPlanReader, delegates to ImplPlanDocument::apply_transition_by_status, persists via ImplPlanWriter, then returns the current TrackMetadata.

type_definitions.name: SetOverrideUseCase
type_definitions.description: Simplified in T013 (status removal): execute now only mutates status_override on TrackMetadata and returns the updated metadata; it no longer writes a derived status field (status was removed from metadata.json per IN-09).

type_definitions.name: TrackBlobReader
type_definitions.description: Usecase-layer secondary port that reads PR branch blobs (spec.json / <layer>-types.json / impl-plan.json / architecture-rules.json) and decodes them into domain aggregates. Modified per ADR 2026-04-19-1242 §D6.2 / T007: `read_track_metadata` is replaced by `read_impl_plan` returning `BlobFetchResult<ImplPlanDocument>` so the task-completion merge gate drives off impl-plan.json instead of the identity-only metadata.json.
